      { "term": "Tip", "definition": "A voluntary gratuity from the customer to the driver. In California, tips are the sole property of the driver and MUST NOT be counted toward minimum wage or base pay obligations." },
      { "term": "Deduction", "definition": "Any amount subtracted from gross earnings — e.g., equipment fees, insurance contributions, tax withholding, or penalty chargebacks. Deductions have different legality and disclosure requirements per jurisdiction." },

      { "term": "Driver Classification", "definition": "The legal status of a driver — employee or independent contractor — which determines which labor laws, tax obligations, and disclosure requirements apply." },
